textPlain: 100% odds the Fed cuts but inflation seems entrenched. Will the cut really help pull the labor market up? Tourism is down, AI is up, etc.

>Will the cut really help pull the labor market up?The capitalists don't care about the labor market as much as they do the stock market.  In Trump's crazy Tilt-a-Whirl Policy and Tariff Generator (TM), what business would invest in expansion beyond what is necessary to grease the palms that need greasing?  Way too much uncertainty.  Time for stock buybacks.
